generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the input current of the high‑torque motor on the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance JointAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the output angular position of the first axis joint"
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance JointAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data artifacts
instance MotorCurrentRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw current measurement trace streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance JointAngleRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angle measurement trace streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque calculated from current and angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine, MachineLearningEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity obtained from successive angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration obtained from successive velocity calculations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

// C10: Models
instance SysmlStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block diagram capturing the structural architecture of the first‑axis robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance AcmeArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME ADL model describing component composition and connectors for the axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink white‑box dynamic model of the motor‑gearbox‑joint subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance MachineLearningPredictorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑driven machine‑learning predictor for wear and degradation based on historical traces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MachineLearningEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT publish/subscribe broker used to stream sensor measurements into the twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine that executes SysML‑to‑Simulink transformed models and runs the dynamic model"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossIdentificationService,
                    WearPredictionService,
                    VisualizationDashboardService,
                    TrajectoryPlanningAssistanceService
]

instance MachineLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime environment for executing machine‑learning predictor models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterOptimizationService,
                    FaultDetectionService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time monitoring of joint position, velocity, and force"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointStateMonitoringInsight
]

instance FrictionLossIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously identifies and quantifies joint friction losses using multi‑physics models"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionLossInsight
]

instance WearPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts wear and degradation of the axis based on simulation and data‑driven models"
    DTDFVocab:provides WearAndDegradationInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualises joint metrics, friction loss, and wear predictions in an integrated operator dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides MetricsVisualizationInsight
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimises controller parameters to improve positioning accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningAssistanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offers closed‑loop assistance for trajectory planning based on predicted dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanningInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in the axis and triggers operator alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides TriggerFaultAlertAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance JointStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into current joint positions, velocities and forces for operators"
]

instance JointFrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified friction loss of the joint derived from multi‑physics simulation"
]

instance WearAndDegradationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected wear level and degradation trend of the motor‑gearbox assembly"
]

instance MetricsVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated visual representation of key joint performance metrics"
]

instance TrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Advisory information for optimal trajectory generation considering predicted dynamics"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically adjusts PID gains and feed‑forward terms to reduce positioning error"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TriggerFaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Raises a fault alarm to the operator interface when abnormal behavior is detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through rigorous traceability of data artifacts and verification of model transformations. Each digital shadow data trace is linked to its generation process and to the corresponding model element, supporting impact analysis. Transformations from high‑level MBSE artifacts (e.g., SysML diagrams) to executable simulation models (e.g., Simulink) are subject to verification methods that check structural and semantic consistency. Validation is performed by comparing model outputs with the measured data traces provided by the digital shadow; observed deviations are used to assess accuracy and trigger model refinement. Sources of uncertainty such as sensor noise or modeling simplifications are acknowledged, and their impact is documented as part of the traceability information."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between the physical sensors and the digital shadow uses the MQTT protocol (as referenced by the Mosquitto client/server implementation). The documents do not provide details on network topology, bandwidth or latency requirements, redundancy mechanisms, or security protocols (e.g., TLS) for this connection."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The approach conforms to the SysML modeling language for system architecture and to UML class diagrams for the Digital Shadow Reference Model. The reference model defines a conformance relation that must be satisfied by any concrete realization, providing a standardised way to map domain concepts to concrete elements. ADLs such as ACME, AADL and MontiArc are employed as standard component‑connector description languages, and the processing step leverages standard simulation and data‑calculation model formats as defined by the reference model."
]
